# Eraco AI

> Eraco is a personal AI assistant that handles the full spectrum of your digital life — music, files, code, debugging, media generation, in-app editing — all in one place, all running privately.

Eraco runs tasks in the background without taking over your screen. Her compute is server-offloaded, so even modest hardware runs her smoothly. All user data is TLS-encrypted; Eraco only sees resource usage, nothing else.

Her flagship feature is the **Adaptive Execution Engine** — she builds new execution paths for tasks she has never seen before, so users are never left without an answer.

Eraco is currently in development and accepting waitlist signups.

## Pages

- [Home](https://eraco.vercel.app/): Overview, waitlist signup
- [Features](https://eraco.vercel.app/features): Full feature breakdown including Adaptive Execution Engine, Teaching Mode, and background task execution
- [Pricing](https://eraco.vercel.app/pricing): Free, Lite, Pro, and Creator tiers; B2B postpaid available
- [About](https://eraco.vercel.app/about): Company vision, privacy model, founding team
- [Security](https://eraco.vercel.app/security): Encryption, data handling, and privacy practices
- [FAQ](https://eraco.vercel.app/faq): Common questions about Eraco's capabilities and availability
- [Blog](https://eraco.vercel.app/blog): Product updates and articles
- [Changelog](https://eraco.vercel.app/changelog): Version history and release notes
- [Careers](https://eraco.vercel.app/careers): Open roles at Eraco
- [Contact](https://eraco.vercel.app/contact): Reach the Eraco team
- [Terms](https://eraco.vercel.app/terms): Terms of service

- [Eraco vs Grok](https://eraco.vercel.app/eraco-vs-grok)
- [Eraco vs Claude Code](https://eraco.vercel.app/eraco-vs-claude-code)
- [Eraco vs LLMs (general)](https://eraco.vercel.app/eraco-vs-llm)
